title: INF-1 LoRA hot-swap public API + Work Profile knob + observability events
goal: Lift the per-adapter LoraStackOps (MT-076 LlamaCpp + MT-084 Candle) to a public ModelRuntime-level LoRA hot-swap surface: kernel.model_runtime.lora_mount, lora_unmount, lora_swap, lora_list. Wire the technique into the Work Profile knob (settings.exec_policy.lora_stack) and FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-LORA-* events per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.a.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/techniques/lora_hotswap.rs orchestrating mount/unmount across both adapters; Tauri commands in app/src-tauri/src/commands/lora.rs; Work Profile schema extension in settings.
unblock_conditions: Per-adapter LoRA impls (MT-076 LlamaCpp + MT-084 Candle) merged.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.a + refinement INF-1: LoRA hot-swap is PRODUCTION on BOTH adapters; this MT lifts the per-adapter LoraStackOps into a public ModelRuntime-level technique API consumed by Inference Lab UI (MT-068 IPC sibling). The technique module: `pub async fn lora_mount(rt: &dyn ModelRuntime, model_id: ModelId, desc: LoraDescriptor, strength: LoraStrength) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>` dispatches to the per-model lora_stack handle. Work Profile knob extension: settings.exec_policy adds `lora_stack: Vec<{ lora_id, strength }>`; on session start, the lora_stack policy is applied via lora_swap to set the runtime to the policy-declared stack. Per-request override path: GenerateRequest.lora_overrides Vec<LoraId> already plumbed in MT-062 trait; this MT verifies end-to-end (UI override -> request -> backend mount-if-needed -> generate). FR events: FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-LORA-MOUNT { model_id, lora_id, strength, source: WorkProfile|PerRequest|AdHoc }, FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-LORA-UNMOUNT, FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-LORA-SWAP { model_id, prev_stack_len, new_stack_len, rolled_back: bool }. Tauri commands: kernel_model_runtime_lora_mount(model_id, lora_descriptor_json, strength), kernel_model_runtime_lora_unmount(model_id, lora_id), kernel_model_runtime_lora_swap(model_id, new_stack), kernel_model_runtime_lora_list(model_id). Conservative-default opt-in: lora_stack on Work Profile defaults to empty; per-request overrides require explicit consent (frontend prompt). Tests: dispatch from technique surface reaches the right adapter (LlamaCpp vs Candle) based on registry binding; Work Profile knob application; FR event emit verified.
risk_if_missed: INF-1 PRODUCTION ships partial (per-adapter only); UI cannot drive LoRA stack uniformly; Work Profile knob not honoured.
validator_focus: Dispatch reaches correct adapter; Work Profile knob applied at session start; FR event source field distinguishes WorkProfile vs PerRequest vs AdHoc; conservative-default opt-in honoured.

minimum_controls: FR source field present and correct in events.
Adapter dispatch tested for both Llama and Candle bindings.
